prompt: A long, narrow corridor stretches into the distance, its concrete floor cracked and broken, with patches of green weeds pushing through the fissures. The walls, once painted a pale gray, are now heavily weathered, with large sections of paint peeling away to reveal the rough texture beneath. On the left side, an old, abandoned arcade machine stands, its screen dark and its casing covered in grime and rust. Metal railings line both sides of the walkway, their surfaces corroded and bent. Fluorescent lights hang from the ceiling, casting a dim, cool glow that illuminates the scene. At the far end, a set of escalators ascends into a brighter, more open area, their steps dark and still. The overall atmosphere is one of quiet decay and abandonment, as if the place has been forgotten for a long time.
